title: Nature's Basket Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nature's Basket Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nature's Basket Holdings Services family as a Full Stack Developer in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
jsonLd.skills: JavaScript, CI/CD, Go, Kubernetes, Python, SQL, TensorFlow, Machine Learning
